packages.name: jackhp95/elm-m3e-core
packages.summary: elm-m3e core: phantom-row types for Kind, Token, Element, Node, Html.Attr.

packages.name: jackhp95/elm-m3e-raw
packages.summary: Raw elm/html builders for elm-m3e components (M3e.Raw.*).

packages.name: jackhp95/elm-m3e-html
packages.summary: Middle-facet HTML attribute and event setters for elm-m3e (M3e.Html.*).

packages.name: jackhp95/elm-m3e-review-facts
packages.summary: elm-review facts for elm-m3e (M3e.Review.Facts). Install in review/ only.

packages.name: jackhp95/elm-m3e-build
packages.summary: Build-facet fluent constructors for elm-m3e components (M3e.Build.*).

packages.name: jackhp95/elm-m3e
packages.summary: elm-m3e standard facet - component builders, barrel, Action, Seam.
